title: Rei Kaworu off screen discussion in 24
display_title: Rei Kaworu off screen discussion in 24
wikitext:
[]: Rei-Kaworu off-screen discussion in 24'?             Quote Post by V » Tue Dec 30, 2008 7:51 pm Here's a thought: the ONE Rei-Kaworu scene ends with Rei saying to Kaworu: "....identify yourself" now here's something: did their conversation continue after this? the "camera" just cuts away to another scene. Is it supposed to be implied that they said more than that? ***how did manga volume 11 handle this? I don't have a translation handy but it too just sort of fades to black. Or are we overthinking this?

[]: Re: Rei-Kaworu off-screen discussion in 24'?             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 30, 2008 8:04 pm V wrote: Here's a thought: the ONE Rei-Kaworu scene ends with Rei saying to Kaworu: "....identify yourself"

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 30, 2008 8:26 pm Kaworu simply "bumps" into Rei to see if they were made of the same thing. Could you continue on this "Particle-Wave Matter" you spoke of please..Me and a friend have often wondered just what Kaworu/Rei are composed of. Does they're skin feel the same or would it be more marshmellow-esk since they can grow and what does Lilith feel like...Hmm...Sorry off topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Tue Dec 30, 2008 8:31 pm I'm pretty sure that Rei and Kaworu are made of normal matter. It's just their souls that aren't human.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 30, 2008 8:32 pm http://evageeks.org/FGP/Particle-wave_matter There you go. Normal matter? No.

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Tue Dec 30, 2008 8:41 pm And what evidence is there to suggest that Rei and Kaworu are made of PWM (before Rei merges with Lilith)?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 30, 2008 9:11 pm http://evageeks.org/FGP/Rei_Ayanami_(In-Depth)#Episodes_1_to_8 That spectrum scan, for one. Rei's ability to seemingly pop out of nothing in 24', for another.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 30, 2008 9:29 pm Well that is my mind fukary of the night on behalf of UrsusArctors. If you were to go up and touch 01's skin, would it feel like skin or something else or say Satchels skin?

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Wed Dec 31, 2008 7:55 am UrsusArctos wrote: http://evageeks.org/FGP/Rei_Ayanami_(In-Depth)#Episodes_1_to_8 That spectrum scan, for one.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 31, 2008 9:55 am Count A'ight wrote: I see absolutely nothing in the scan that is even remotely indicative of PWM.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Dec 31, 2008 11:36 am UrsusArctos wrote: http://evageeks.org/FGP/Particle-wave_matter There you go. Normal matter? No.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 31, 2008 12:22 pm Here ; this old thread of V's is already titled as the perfect battleground. (Though other threads, both local and archived, have covered the same topic in varying levels of mind-warping detail.) V wrote: But can someone give a transcript of the final page of the Kaworu-Rei meeting in the manga?
